text:
On Wed, Apr 19, 2000 at 01:08:18PM +0300, Maxim Sobolev wrote:
> diff -ruN /usr/ports/games/quakeforge/Makefile quakeforge/Makefile
> --- /usr/ports/games/quakeforge/Makefile	Mon Apr 17 10:26:33 2000
> +++ quakeforge/Makefile	Wed Apr 19 12:47:49 2000
> @@ -6,139 +6,54 @@
>  #
>  
>  PORTNAME=	QuakeForge

This can be changed to "quakeforge" now, and we remove DISTNAME. Right?

-- 
Will Andrews <andrews@technologist.com>
